name: Shrimp'n' Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Shrimp, cooked, peeled, and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked shrimp, rice, celery, olives, green pepper, pimiento, onion, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Add mayonnaise to taste.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Chill thoroughly before serving.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
6. Garnish with tomato wedges and celery leaves.
7. Serve with French dressing.
